reviews.review_title: Flat out the best virtual monitor app
reviews.review_description: Ive tried all of the apps for virtual monitors on the quest store and this is by far the simplest and best app for it. Kudos to the dev team to have kept it simple and so easy to use. It just works perfectly.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! If you have any feedback or feature requests, feel free to drop a message on our Discord anytime!

reviews.review_description:
I've been using Overay Desk for a few weeks now, and it has completely changed how I work in VR.
I usually connect it via USB, and the connection with my PC is very stable. Being able to place multiple virtual monitors around me freely makes it super convenient.
I also love that I can take notes directly in VR and have them synced to my PC. It’s perfect for deep focus sessions, and I plan to keep using it for my personal work.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is the Overay Team. We're delighted to hear that you're enjoying our product and finding it useful!

We are currently planning to add several new features in addition to Virtual Multi-monitors and Notes. If you have any features you'd like to suggest, please feel free to visit our Discord anytime and share your ideas!

reviews.review_description: As a 3D structural designer, this app is a total game-changer for my workflow. I stumbled upon it through an ad for the XR Pen, and the ability to instantly pull up multiple displays while I'm in the middle of 3D modeling is incredible. The UI/UX is also a huge plus—it's so much cleaner and more polished than other apps I've tried. The only thing that would make this perfect is Bluetooth keyboard and mouse support. I'd love to be able to work from my couch while connected to my PC.

developer_response.body: Hello, this is the Overay Team. We are thrilled to hear that you are utilizing the XR Pen feature for your work! Regarding the Bluetooth keyboard and mouse functionality you mentioned, we're happy to inform you that this feature is currently in our development plan. For more details, you can visit our Overay Discord community at: https://discord.com/invite/hgKnEHfwkr. If you have any other feature requests or feedback, posting them in the community is the fastest way for us to review and respond. Please don't hesitate to share any issues or additional requests you may have in the community at any time!

reviews.review_description:
Here’s a cleaner, more professional version of your message that keeps the same feedback and tone, just with better flow and clarity:

⸻

I was really excited to try this app — then I actually used it.

First, I’m forced to create a military-grade password just to get started? That’s already frustrating. Then I’m stuck in a mandatory tutorial with no option to skip. It took me 15 minutes just to get through the “Lock Screen” lesson. I almost quit right there.

Finally, I get into the app — and the screen only fills about 33% of my display. Why? It looks like whoever designed this has never used decent software before.

Then I realize: this app is meant to connect to a computer that’s already in front of me… with its own keyboard and mouse. That defeats the whole purpose. I wanted to use this in my bedroom to control a computer in my living room. Total waste of time.

Here’s what you need to fix:
	•	Let people skip the tutorial
	•	Make the computer screen actually go full screen
	•	Add support for an on-screen keyboard or let users pair a Bluetooth keyboard
	•	Prioritize intuitive design — this should be easy and seamless

The app has so much potential, but it’s buried under bad UX choices.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is the Overay Team.

First and foremost, we apologize for the frustrating experience you had with our app. We believe the issues you encountered were due to inadequate guidance on our tutorial and core features.

We have recently released Overay Desk 1.0.0, which has been updated to improve the areas you pointed out. Based on your valuable feedback, here are the key changes:

1. Removed the Mandatory Tutorial & Now Starts in Full-Screen.
We have removed the tutorial that could feel forced. The app has been improved to start directly with a full-screen monitor view, allowing for a much more convenient and immediate experience.

2. Improved User Interface (UI).
We have applied a more intuitive and cohesive UI design to ensure a smoother and more seamless user experience.

Additionally, regarding the remote control functionality you suggested, we are happy to let you know that it is currently in the planning and scheduling phase of development. We plan to develop and release it as quickly as possible.

Once again, we are truly sorry for the inconvenient experience. We are committed to using your feedback to create a better app and will do our best to provide a far superior user experience.

reviews.review_description:
Connection was easy, setting up the screens a little more fiddly. But once I got to grips with it I found it really easy to use. 
Now off to mess with the mind map functions. 

Looking forward to new enhancements!

First,the screens aren't full-screen 
Second and mostly ,it dimmed my actual display as a feature but the brightness never returned to normal after exiting the software. I had to delete it from my device!
Now, my brightness is at minimum and windows/graphics controls aren't changing anything, which is very frustrating. 
It seems that the software had change the settings from my monitor itself directly... it was a pain to figure out after my time wasted.
 I would recommend AVOIDING this app.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear about the issue you experienced. This is not the intended behavior, and we’d like to assist you further.
Please reach out to us on our Discord channel, and we’ll respond promptly to help resolve the problem:
discord.gg/hgKnEHfwkr
Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we’ll do our best to address it.

reviews.review_description:
Good applications with good configuration.
It's easy to configure, add, remove and change the virtual monitors. It's a shame it won't reproduce sound but for my use it works perfectly

developer_response.body: Hello, this is the Overay team! Thank you for your feedback! Just so you know, sound support is currently in development, so you can look forward to even more enhanced features soon!

reviews.review_title: Decent but there's artifacts in display
reviews.review_description:
While it does work I have been getting pretty consistent pixelation artifacts around any kind of movement. My PC is plugged in via ethernet and my Quest 3 is over wi fi via a TP link router in the same room. This worked fine for immersed but not here. I can't get my quest to pick up my PC's hotspot for some reason so I can't test if the hotspot helps.

Encoding and decoding need work it seems, either that or there are issues with AMD cards.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is the Overay team.

We apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced.
If you leave us a message on our Discord, we will be able to provide support promptly.

We appreciate your feedback as it helps us improve OverayStudio.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: After struggling with Immersed, I was recommended this by a friend. Got started in just a few minutes. No problems connecting and you can put your screens anywhere. I love it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience! We're delighted to hear that our service met your expectations and that you found it easy to get started.
Your feedback motivates us to keep improving.
Enjoy your seamless experience

reviews.review_description:
It was pretty straightforward to get it to work with multiple screens and controls are largely intuitive. Image quality was very crisp and colourful and using my PC felt really responsive at least for Youtube

Here's feedback to some minor issues:

Passthrough turned itself off by itself and couldn't turn it back on.

Sometimes the App crashes when applying a layout.

UI needs some antialiasing on Quest 3.

VR controller support and hand-tracking would be nice for using the PC through the App. Let's say I'm doing the laundry and want to watch Youtube, an ability to pause or use the browser with my fingers would be useful.

No option for audio to be routed through the headset. Can only listen through PC so speakers or headphones need to be connected to PC. This makes Overay not suited for AFK use at the moment.

To connect to PC you need to press connect on both Headset App and PC Host App. Other similar software can connect just via the headset after first connection.

PC Host needs Administrator level permissions on Windows to open (That pop up with the Windows Shield icon where you have to allow the App access). Competing apps don't need that.

PC Host installation requires restarting the PC, which can be inconvenient to some. It is only needed during the install and not afterwards.

developer_response.body:
Hello Valo,

I've just learned how to reply to reviews, so I'm leaving one now. I still remember our first review and the messages on Discord.

If you ever need anything, please feel free to provide feedback. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: It's quite amazing! The integration is easy and the usage is intuitive. It’s great to be able to smoothly use multiple virtual monitors in the layout I want. It seems like it will be very useful. I'll keep using it!

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is Overlay Studio.
We are so glad that you are satisfied with our product.

We plan to add many features in the future, so please give us a lot of interest, and please feel free to make suggestions through Discord at any time.
